title: Periodicals
content: Periodicals Subscription of periodicals is important for a library. Periodicals keep LRC users abreast with the latest happenings in their respective areas or areas of interest. We further categorize periodicals in three groups: Journals: These are the periodicals which keep updates on scholarly research. Magazines: These periodicals are containing latest information on day today happenings in all areas of learning. Some of these are of subject oriented magazines and some are of general reading purpose. Documents Scope Titles Total Volumes Journals 33 73 Magazines 40 Print Periodicals (View Detail)
